---
title: "William Sturges Bourne"
---

## William Sturges Bourne

**Dates:** (1769–1845)

### Description

father of Anne Sturges Bourne, politician

### Biography

Born William Sturges, he changed his surname to Sturges Bourne in 1803.

### Letters

- Letter from Mar 5th 1896

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
